---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, workflow, or capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Module**
Which module does this affect? (Core / RTK / SOC / IRT / GRC / New)

**Describe the feature**
What should SPECTRA be able to do?

**Use case**
When would someone use this? What problem does it solve?

**Proposed implementation**
If you have ideas on how to implement it (new agent, new workflow, enhancement to existing):

**Additional context**
References, frameworks, or standards that should be considered.
